name: @pocketjs/cine
description: GBA cinematic-montage DSL: author interactive life-montage films in TypeScript, ship Mode-0 parallax, blending, raster FX and CJK typewriter captions as a real .gba ROM. Independent sibling of @pocketjs/aot.

scripts.build: bun compiler/cli.ts build film/progressive-life.ts --out dist/progressive-life.gba --title PROGLIFE
scripts.smoke: bun test/gen-placeholder-art.ts && bun compiler/cli.ts build test/smoke-film.ts --out dist/smoke.gba --title CINESMOKE
